title: Register and save your place for our Monetization webinar on Dec. 7th!

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all!

Join us on Wednesday, December 7th, at 11:00 AM EST for a webinar on Monetization in the Apps Marketplace! In the session, I will be covering everything you need to successfully monetize on monday.

Please complete this short registration form if you would like to attend. I hope to see you there!
